project_overview.name: Yazanaki Empire
project_overview.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) merged with Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5) for premium structure
project_overview.vibe: Professional system, private network, controlled organization. NO gaming tropes.

typography.guidelines: Slight negative letter spacing on headings. Professional, readable, no gaming or edgy display fonts.

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0B0D10]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#1F2630]

motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Subtle border color change to accent (#C6A85B) or slight background elevation. No flashy animations, no scale-up bounce.

hero_visual_concept.description: Subtle, low opacity (10-15%) geometric grid. Nodes connect slowly with CSS animations or lightweight particles. Keep it minimal, looking like a secure data network, not a sci-fi hacker terminal.
hero_visual_concept.implementation: Use a responsive absolute positioned SVG in the right column of the hero. Draw thin lines (stroke='#1F2630') connecting to small circles (fill='#C6A85B' opacity 0.3) that pulse slightly (opacity 0.2 to 0.4 over 4s).

institutional_abstract_bg.description: Abstract dark geometric architecture. Use as a very low opacity background overlay for the Systems or Governance sections if needed.

system_grid_texture.description: Dark mode abstract grid texture. Use for hero background (at 5-10% opacity) beneath the SVG network if texture is desired.

components.button_primary: bg-[#C6A85B] text-black px-6 py-2.5 rounded-[12px] font-medium text-[15px] hover:bg-[#D4B76A] transition-colors duration-150
components.button_secondary: bg-[#11151A] text-[#E8ECF1] border border-[#1F2630] px-6 py-2.5 rounded-[12px] font-medium text-[15px] hover:border-[#C6A85B] transition-colors duration-150
components.card_base: bg-[#11151A] border border-[#1F2630] rounded-[12px] p-6 transition-colors duration-200
components.input_field: bg-[#0B0D10] border border-[#1F2630] rounded-[12px] px-4 py-2.5 text-[15px] text-[#E8ECF1] placeholder-[#6B7380] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C6A85B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C6A85B] transition-all duration-150
components.tag_locked: bg-[#171C22] border border-[#1F2630] text-[#9AA4AF] text-[13px] px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1.5 uppercase tracking-wider

global.navbar: Sticky navbar 72px, wordmark 'YAZANAKI' left, links center (Clans, Alliances, Systems), Apply button right. bg-[#0B0D10]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#1F2630]
global.footer: Minimal. Copyright, standard structural links. py-12 border-t border-[#1F2630]

landing_page.hero: Split layout. Left: H1 48px, Body 15px, CTA. Right: Subtle SVG network/grid animation. Background can use `system_grid_texture` at 5% opacity.
landing_page.stats_bar: Horizontal bar showing: 5 Core Divisions, 1 Active Alliance, Structured Governance. Uses #171C22 bg with 1px border.
landing_page.structure_preview: Grid of 5 small clan cards (SNU, ANO, ONF, ONA, KASAII).
landing_page.alliance_preview: Excalibur card, visually differentiated (maybe slightly different border opacity or layout).

core_clans_page.header: H1 and brief intro about the 5 permanent divisions.
core_clans_page.grid: Grid layout. 5 cards for SNU, ANO, ONF, ONA, KASAII. Each labeled 'Permanent Division' with a 'Locked Structure' tag. Hover state: gold border.

alliances_page.header: H1 on external alliances and integration.
alliances_page.system_explanation: 3-column layout: Structured Agreements, Scalable Terms, Economic Integration.
alliances_page.cta_section: Apply for Alliance block. Clicking 'Apply' opens a Shadcn Dialog (Modal) form.
alliances_page.apply_modal_form: Fields: Faction Name (Input), Size (Input/Select), Specialization (Select), Alliance Type (Select), Contribution Capacity (Textarea), Notes (Textarea).

systems_page.sections: Vertical or bento-grid sections for Economy, Governance, Alliances. Use abstract icons (lucide-react: e.g., Network, Landmark, Scale) and clean typography.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent.file_extension: Use .js and .jsx extensions. DO NOT use .tsx or TypeScript.
technical_instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, modals, and nav links MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="nav-clans-link"`, `data-testid="apply-submit-button"`).
technical_instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use Shadcn UI for Dialog (modal), Select, Input, Textarea. Strip default Vercel look and apply the provided Tailwind hex codes and border radii (rounded-[12px] / 12px).
technical_instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react for minimal, structured icons. No gamer/fantasy icons (no swords, shields, fire). Use geometric shapes, networks, nodes, layers.
